zh.lifeSummary: 當Nicholas de Meinill於大約1245年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾爾頓時，他的父親Stephen de Meinill42歲，母親Baroness Sybilla de Anlasby Aslakby36歲。他於1273年與Christian Huntingfield在英國英格蘭越可爾爾頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1299年5月27日在英國越可爾享年55歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nicholas de Meinill于大约1245年出生在英国英格兰越可爾爾頓时，他的父亲Stephen de Meinill42岁，母亲Baroness Sybilla de Anlasby Aslakby36岁。他于1273年与Christian Huntingfield在英国英格兰越可爾爾頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1299年5月27日在英国越可爾享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Nicholas de Meinill was born about 1245, in Whorlton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Stephen de Meinill, was 42 and his mother, Baroness Sybilla de Anlasby Aslakby, was 36. He married Christian Huntingfield in 1273, in Whorlton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 27 May 1299, in Yorkshire, England, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nicholas de Meinill est né environ 1245, à Whorlton, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Stephen de Meinill, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Baroness Sybilla de Anlasby Aslakby, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Christian Huntingfield en 1273, à Whorlton, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 27 mai 1299, à Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nicholas de Meinill um 1245 in Whorlton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Stephen de Meinill 42 und seine Mutter Baroness Sybilla de Anlasby Aslakby 36. Er hat 1273 in Whorlton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Christian Huntingfield geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 27. Mai 1299 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas de Meinill è nato il circa 1245 nel Whorlton, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Stephen de Meinill, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Baroness Sybilla de Anlasby Aslakby, aveva 36 anni. Lui sposato Christian Huntingfield nel 1273, nel Whorlton, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 27 maggio 1299, nel Yorkshire, England, all'età di 55 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Nicholas de Meinillが約1245年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアウオルルトンで生まれた時，父Stephen de Meinillは42歳，母Baroness Sybilla de Anlasby Aslakbyは36歳であった。1273年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアウオルルトンでChristian Huntingfieldと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1299年5月27日にイギリスヨークシュアイアで55歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Nicholas de Meinill(이)가 대략 1245년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 화를턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Stephen de Meinill(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Baroness Sybilla de Anlasby Aslakby(은)는 36세였다. 그는 1273년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 화를턴에서 Christian Huntingfield(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1299년 5월 27일 영국 요르크실르에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas de Meinill nasceu aproximadamente 1245, em Whorlton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Stephen de Meinill, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Baroness Sybilla de Anlasby Aslakby, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Christian Huntingfield em 1273, em Whorlton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 27 de maio de 1299, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 55 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nicholas de Meinill родился около 1245 г. в местности уаурлтон, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Stephen de Meinill было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Baroness Sybilla de Anlasby Aslakby, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Christian Huntingfield в 1273 г. в местности уаурлтон, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 27 мая 1299 г. в местности еркшир, Англия в возрасте 55 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Nicholas de Meinill nació aproximadamente 1245, en Whorlton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Stephen de Meinill, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Baroness Sybilla de Anlasby Aslakby, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Christian Huntingfield en 1273, en Whorlton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 27 de mayo de 1299, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 55 años.
